title: Batched Ensembl VEP-shaped variant annotation
description: Materialize one within-limit VEP-style POST response through ducknng_ncurl_table. The host supplies DuckNNG, TLS, endpoint policy, and bindings; SQL composes the request body, unnests transcript and colocated-variant structures, and filters normalized rows. Multi-request fanout is a separate bounded resolver contract.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (here, a ducknng_ncurl_table POST to VEP).
